title: Rebirth
description: The return to embodied existence after death, described differently across traditions. Tibetan Buddhism describes the Sidpa Bardo's womb-entrance through vision of copulating parents. Steiner describes a ~2,100-year journey through zodiacal spheres. The classical Egyptian tradition describes a permanent afterlife in the Field of Reeds rather than reincarnation. Tantraloka describes traversal through world-levels (bhuvanas) to find a suitable receptacle.
